user.title: IOT Lightning Bridge HACS Setup
user.description: Configure your IOT Lightning Bridge credentials. MQTT integration must be enabled in Home Assistant.

data_description.broker_prefix: MQTT topic prefix (e.g., iot/lightning). Device will use this for state and command topics.

error.invalid_api_token: Invalid API token. Token must be at least 3 characters long.
error.invalid_broker_prefix: Broker prefix cannot be empty. Use format like: iot/lightning

abort.already_configured: This integration is already configured. You can only add one IOT Lightning Bridge per Home Assistant instance.

init.title: IOT Lightning Bridge Options
init.description: Update your IOT Lightning Bridge configuration. Changes will take effect immediately.
